productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Slip-On Brown Shoes
description: Amp up your style quotient with these leather slip-ons from red tape. Stylish to the hilt and absolutely comfortable for the feet, they're a perfect addition to your wardrobe. Team them with chinos and a simple shirt for that cool, casual look.UpperComplete nubuck upper for that stylish look and comfort feelLong tongue for easy wearRugged stitch detailing for style and durabilityMid-solePU mid-sole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionComplete inner fabric lining for breathable comfortFabric foot-bed with leather wings on the back foot for all-day comfort and sweat protectionBrand badge on the foot-bedOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with herringbone pattern terraced lugs, for maximum grip, traction and easy movement of the footshoe careUse a suede brush to dust surfaceDo not store in direct sunlight
